fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the job queue entry in the log.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Start Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the job was started.

fields.name: End Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the job ended.

fields.name: Object Type to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the object that is to be run for the job.

fields.name: Object ID to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the object that is to be run for the job.

fields.name: Object Caption to Run
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name or caption of the object that was run for the job.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the running of the job queue entry in a log.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the job queue entry in the log.

fields.name: Error Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies an error that occurred in the job queue.

fields.name: Job Queue Category Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the category code for the entry in the job queue log.

fields.name: Parameter String
fields.tooltip: Specifies the parameter string of the corresponding job.
